fitsZoom
  • Zoom Functions
  • View page source

Zoom Functions

Function to perform zoom fits images.

class zoom.FITSZoom(filename)

Zoom into the given coordinates and create a cutout with the given dimensions

plot(data=None, save=False, **kwargs)

Use matplotlib imshow to display the cutout

Returns:

the plt axes with the image

Return type:

axes

save(cutout, output_filename)

Save a cutout to a new FITS file, without changing the cutout’s WCS in the header.

setup(extension=0)

Extract the necessary attributes from the fits header Print out the recommended image bounds and sky coordinates

Parameters:

  • extension (int) – the index where the desired data is within the fits

  • alternative_names (dict) – dictionary mapping the names of appropriate values

zoom(coordinates, cutout_dimensions, save=False)

Zoom into the given coordinates and create a cutout with the given dimensions

Parameters:

  • coordinates (tuple) – ra, dec

  • cutout_dimensions (tuple) – dimensions
